EnterpriseSDK
Table of Contents

Interface IEllipticArc

Namespace
ESRI.ArcGIS.Geometry
Assembly
ESRI.Server.Geometry.dll

Provides access to members that control properties of elliptic arc segments.

[InterfaceType(ComInterfaceType.InterfaceIsIUnknown)]
[Guid("FA44C5F5-16C6-11D2-AA7A-00C04FA37BA4")]
public interface IEllipticArc : ICurve, IGeometry

Properties

CenterPoint

The center point of the arc.

IPoint CenterPoint { get; }

Property Value

IPoint

Examples

Sample Snippet

CentralAngle

The included (or central) angle.

double CentralAngle { get; set; }

Property Value

double

Sample Snippet

Dimension 

esriGeometryDimension Dimension { get; }

Property Value

esriGeometryDimension

Envelope 

IEnvelope Envelope { get; }

Property Value

IEnvelope

FromAngle[bool]

The start angle (measured from a horizontal line through the center point) defining where the arc starts.

double FromAngle[bool ellipseStd] { get; set; }

Parameters

ellipseStd bool

Property Value

double

Examples

Sample Snippet

FromPoint 

IPoint FromPoint { get; set; }

Property Value

IPoint

GeometryType 

esriGeometryType GeometryType { get; }

Property Value

esriGeometryType

IsCircular

Indicates if this elliptical arc is acutally circular (major and minor axes same length).

bool IsCircular { get; }

Property Value

bool

Examples

Sample Snippet

IsClosed 

bool IsClosed { get; }

Property Value

bool

IsCounterClockwise

Indicates if this elliptic arc is oriented counter-clockwise from its 'from' point to its 'to' point.

bool IsCounterClockwise { get; set; }

Property Value

bool

Examples

Sample Snippet

IsEmpty 

bool IsEmpty { get; }

Property Value

bool

IsLine

Indicates if the arc is degenerated to a line.

bool IsLine { get; }

Property Value

bool

Examples

Sample Snippet

IsMinor

Indicates whether the arc is a minor arc or a major arc.

bool IsMinor { get; set; }

Property Value

bool

Examples

Sample Snippet

IsPoint

Indicates if the arc is degenerated to a point.

bool IsPoint { get; }

Property Value

bool

double Length { get; }

double

ISpatialReference SpatialReference { get; set; }

ISpatialReference

ToAngle[bool]

The end angle (measured from a horizontal line through the center point) defining where the arc ends.

double ToAngle[bool ellipseStd] { get; set; }

Parameters

ellipseStd bool

double

Methods

Complement()

Changes this ellipse into its complement; 'from' and 'to' points are unchanged.

void Complement()
